source.source_commit_note: The rmux commit these artifacts were built from. Re-stamped by scripts/build-web-crypto-wasm.sh on regeneration. This blob is test-only and never shipped to production.

toolchain.rustc_note: Exact rustc that reproduces these bytes. verify-wasm-from-source.mjs exports it as RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN so a floating 'stable' runner cannot silently change codegen.
toolchain.wasm_bindgen_note: These bytes are produced by wasm-pack 0.13.1's PINNED, DOWNLOADED prebuilt wasm-bindgen 0.2.118 — not a source-built cli. A `cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli --version 0.2.118` built from source emits the same .js glue but a DIFFERENT .wasm, so reproduction must use wasm-pack's prebuilt path (no conflicting wasm-bindgen on PATH). Building the cli reproducibly from source is tracked future hardening.

build_command: wasm-pack build crates/rmux-web-crypto --release --target web --out-name rmux_web_crypto_wasm -- --no-default-features --features wasm-test
verification: Two gates. (1) scripts/verify-wasm-provenance.mjs runs on every build (fail-closed): committed bytes must match these hashes recorded in the same diff — tamper-evident against accidental drift, but NOT a binding to source on its own. (2) scripts/verify-wasm-from-source.mjs is the source->binary gate: it rebuilds this blob from the rmux source at source_commit (via scripts/build-web-crypto-wasm.sh wasm-test, pinned toolchain) and asserts byte-for-byte equality. It enforces FAIL-CLOSED in CI once source_commit is reachable on the public Helvesec/rmux remote; while that commit is not yet public the rebuild is DEFERRED (only gate 1 runs). This blob is test-only and never shipped to production. Reproduce locally now: RMUX_SOURCE_DIR=/path/to/rmux node scripts/verify-wasm-from-source.mjs.
